lessons.title: Introduction to Core Modules & The fs Module (Reading)
lessons.description: Learn what core modules are and how to read files with `fs`.

lessons.title: Writing Files with fs
lessons.description: Write, append, and delete files using the `fs` module.

lessons.title: Working with Paths using path Module
lessons.description: Manipulate file paths safely with the `path` module.

lessons.title: Getting System Info with os Module
lessons.description: Retrieve operating system details like CPU, memory, and platform.

lessons.title: Combining Modules: A Practical Example
lessons.description: Use fs, path, and os together to build a simple system info logger.
